problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Combining Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
